ticker.text: Fallout 5, two remasters, and an Obsidian project are moving
GTA 6 opens the strongest preorder campaign Newzoo has tracked
Final Fantasy XIV Mobile closes September 30; global version canceled
EA's reported $55 billion takeover moves closer to EU approval
God of War is recasting its live-action Kratos
Black Ops 7 and Warzone Season 5 go live July 23

lead.title: Bethesda Just Mapped Fallout's Future — Fallout 5, Two Remasters, and an Obsidian Game Are Moving
lead.dek: Bethesda confirmed Fallout 5 is in preproduction, remasters of Fallout 3 and New Vegas are underway, and Obsidian is officially back in the wasteland. No release dates yet — but the franchise is no longer trapped behind one studio's calendar.
lead.author: The Gamer Scene Editorial

poll.question: Which Fallout project should arrive first?

calendar.title: Black Ops 7 / Warzone Season 5
calendar.sub: Season reset, new maps, Zombies, and weapons

calendar.title: Fortnite AI NPC Publishing
calendar.sub: Conversational characters open to UEFN islands

comments.name: Marcus T.
comments.body: A multi-studio Fallout pipeline with Obsidian back in the wasteland is the best-case scenario nobody thought Bethesda would actually commit to. Now show footage before the hype writes checks the roadmap can't cash.

comments.name: Priya S.
comments.body: GTA 6 pulling a record $260M preorder week from a third-party estimate is wild, but remember Newzoo is modeling, not Rockstar disclosing. Still, the appetite is obviously real.

comments.name: Devon K.
comments.body: FFXIV Mobile dying before it even reached global is brutal. That's a lot of goodwill and dev time gone. Square Enix's mobile strategy needs a rethink.

comments.name: Jade W.
comments.body: The Black Flag Resynced analysis nails it — a gorgeous rebuild wrapped in modern Ubisoft baggage. The Jackdaw is still the best ship in gaming, but the launcher outage on a single-player game is unacceptable.
